sources.name: Scottish Financial Review
sources.notes: Dedicated Scottish financial and business news site. High signal-to-noise for Scottish VC deals — confirmed 6 relevant deals in the May 2026 run. URL structure: /YYYY/MM/DD/slug.

sources.name: Business Scotland Magazine
sources.notes: Good for mid-market and growth deals

sources.name: The Scotsman — Business
sources.notes: Scan business section headlines. No section-specific feed — full-site RSS used.

sources.name: The Herald — Business
sources.notes: Strong Glasgow/West of Scotland coverage

sources.name: Insider.co.uk
sources.notes: Scottish business focused, very relevant

sources.name: TechHub Scotland / Scottish Tech Scene blogs
sources.notes: Aggregates Scottish business news

sources.name: Crunchbase — Scotland recent
sources.notes: Filter by Scotland, last 90 days. Partially paywalled — extract whatever free content is visible

sources.name: DuckDuckGo — Scottish VC search
sources.notes: Run each query as ?q=<encoded query>. JS-free endpoint, returns plain HTML results

sources.name: TechCrunch — Scotland search
sources.notes: Larger deals that make international press

sources.name: Sifted — UK/Scotland
sources.notes: European startup media, covers UK deals well

sources.name: Beauhurst
sources.notes: UK equity investment tracker. Mostly paywalled — extract whatever free headlines are visible

sources.name: Tech Funding News
sources.notes: Covers UK/EU startup funding rounds

sources.name: Techstart Ventures — Portfolio
sources.notes: Pre-seed/seed investor very active in Scotland. Portfolio page links to press coverage of follow-on rounds — fetch the page and follow coverage links to extract deal details.

sources.name: Octopus Ventures — Blog
sources.notes: UK-wide VC with some Scottish portfolio companies. Blog features investment announcement posts explaining why they backed specific companies — scan for Scottish deals.

sources.name: Highlight Capital — News
sources.notes: Check for Scottish deal announcements

sources.name: PXN Ventures — News
sources.notes: Edinburgh-based successor to Par Equity (merged with Praetura Ventures in 2025). Strong Scottish focus.

sources.name: Older Bull — Portfolio News
sources.notes: Check for Scottish deal announcements

sources.name: Scottish Enterprise Investment Fund — News
sources.notes: Quasi-public co-investor, frequently appears alongside VC deals

sources.name: BGF — News
sources.notes: Growth-stage investor with Edinburgh office. RSS feed exists but was empty at last check — fall back to HTML if feed yields nothing.

sources.name: Prairie Fund — News
sources.notes: Check for Scottish deal announcements

sources.name: Maven Capital Partners — Latest News
sources.notes: Maven's newsroom covers deal announcements across their funds including Investment Fund for Scotland (IFS Maven Equity Finance). Good source for Scottish Seed/Growth deals.

sources.name: Kelvin Capital — News
sources.notes: Glasgow-based VC with West of Scotland focus. Active deal announcements and portfolio milestones.

sources.name: Epidarex Capital — News
sources.notes: Edinburgh-based life sciences specialist. Covers funding rounds and portfolio milestones for biotech/medtech companies.

sources.name: Mercia Asset Management — News
sources.notes: UK-wide VC with MEIF and other funds active in Scotland. Deal announcements cover Seed through Series B.

sources.name: Parkwalk — News
sources.notes: University spinout specialist active across UK ecosystems including Edinburgh and St Andrews. Covers funding rounds and portfolio milestones.

sources.name: Edinburgh Innovations — News
sources.notes: University of Edinburgh's commercialisation arm. Covers spinout funding rounds and investment news via Old College Capital. High relevance for Edinburgh deep tech and life sciences deals.

sources.name: Archangels — News
sources.notes: Scotland's oldest and largest angel syndicate. Consistently active in Edinburgh life sciences, medtech, and software. High-signal source for early-stage Scottish deals.
